title: Subitem Automation to Update Item
excerpt:

(this posts an update to the subitem only)
When (Item) Status changes to Anything create an Update with …

posts.author: ktomasko (Kristyn Tomasko)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have the following automations set up:

  • When Subitem Status changes to Anything create an Update with This Text
    (this posts an update to the subitem only)
  • When (Item) Status changes to Anything create an Update with this Text
    (this posts an update to the Item only)
    Both of the above are working.

I would also like an Update created/posted to the Parent Item when a Subitem Status changes - anyone know how I can accomplish this? Any help is appreciated.
